emails.subject: Re:  TW  imbal revaluation
emails.body: Re: TW imbal revaluation Ok. Did you tell Steve? I Guess that's additive to my stretch? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: TW  imbal revaluation
emails.body: RE: TW imbal revaluation Yes I told Steve. Your stretch number keeps growing. You may need to take an evening job to cover all the stretch he has assigned you. I will be attending a TW imbalance meeting on Thursday morning faciliated by Market Services. Dan Fancler has also been invited along with Kim Watson, Michelle Lokay T.K. Have a good evening! Jan To: Moore, Jan
